name: less
description: View file contents one screen at a time

options.name: -i
options.description: Search case-insensitively unless the pattern has capitals

options.name: -S
options.description: Chop long lines rather than wrapping them

options.name: -F
options.description: Quit immediately if the content fits one screen

options.name: -R
options.description: Output ANSI color escape sequences in raw form

options.name: -X
options.description: Do not clear the screen on exit

options.name: -g
options.description: Highlight only the last string found by a search

options.name: +F
options.description: Start in follow mode, like tail -f
